proposed_diff.working_title: How Embracer's writedown changed indie publishing terms
proposed_diff.thesis: Surviving studios are signing 2022-rate deals to keep going — Embracer's writedown shifted bargaining power away from devs in a way locked in for 18+ months.
proposed_diff.why_now: Embracer's Q3 8-K reclassified MGs as conditional liabilities; Devolver's prelim Q4 echoed the change.

rationale: Topic-optimize round 01HXYZABC456PQR789STUVWXYZ ranked this top-K rank 1 by composite (rubric 7.6 + SSR mean 8.0 + novelty bonus 0.15). The reclassification angle is the load-bearing element — the deal shape can't lock without it.
